ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "arrival_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the process arrives in the system */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Time required to execute the process */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority assigned to the process */,
  "finish_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the process is finished */,
  "turnaround_time" INTEGER /* Total time the process spent in the system (Turnaround Time) */,
  "urgency_level" TEXT /* Urgency level of the process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheduling algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheduling algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process execution */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being executed */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduling algorithm used */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the process execution started */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the process execution ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process execution (e.g., 'running', 'completed', 'failed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_execution_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES scheduling_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_execution_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being executed */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the resource was allocated */,
  "deallocation_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the resource was deallocated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being executed */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the process */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* Time the process spent waiting */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the process to respond */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)
